ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employee_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee classification */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification became effective */,
  "salary_grade" INTEGER /* Salary grade associated with the classification */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job responsibilities */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_classifications_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pay_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pay schedule */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the pay schedule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pay schedule */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of pay (e.g., bi-weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pay_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pay range */,
  "minimum_pay" REAL /* Minimum pay for the range */,
  "maximum_pay" REAL /* Maximum pay for the range */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated pay schedule */,
  "pay_step" INTEGER /* Pay step within the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee classification */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was applied */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the modification */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_modifications_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES employee_classifications ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's classification */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Employee's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Employee's last name */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "current_pay" REAL /* Employee's current pay */,
  "address" TEXT /* Employee's home address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES employee_classifications ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_pay_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pay adjustment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date when the pay adjustment occurred */,
  "previous_pay" REAL /* Pay before the adjustment */,
  "new_pay" REAL /* Pay after the adjustment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the pay adjustment */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_pay_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee classification */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role and responsibilities */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed list of responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES employee_classifications ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was conducted */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Score received in the performance review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the review */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals set for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_records" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the training occurred */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of training completion */,
  "trainer" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_records" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., vacation, sick) */,
  "number_of_days" INTEGER /* Number of days taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_sheets" (
  "time_sheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time sheet */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "week_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week for the time sheet */,
  "week_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week for the time sheet */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Total hours worked in the week */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of time sheet approval */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the time sheet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_sheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_sheets_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for eligibility */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "employee_benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee benefit assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benefit */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee enrolled in the benefit */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Date when coverage starts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplinary_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disciplinary action */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disciplinary action */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the disciplinary action */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was assigned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was returned */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the equipment when returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_assignments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_assignments_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., in use, available) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Manager's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Manager's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Manager's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Manager's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., time off, equipment) */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
